charter.mission: Run a bounded pilot with the three branch rows admitted into guarded training context before any broader row-geometry widen.
in_scope: admit only the three V1.12AW guarded branch rows
retain the branch patch feature family
test core and guarded targets under this narrower branch admission
success_criteria: the admitted branch subset does not recreate the V1.12AU role collapse

interpretation: V1.12AX is the first pilot that uses the V1.12AW admissibility cut operationally.
This remains bounded, report-only, and non-deployable.
